vivian-whisper.instruction: Whispering, very soft and intimate, speaking slowly and quietly.

ryan-aggressive.instruction: Very angry, shouting, aggressive tone with fast pacing.

serena-cheerful.instruction: Extremely happy, energetic, high-pitched and cheerful, speaking excitedly.

dylan-sad.instruction: Crying, very sad, sobbing tone, speaking slowly with a trembling voice.

aiden-news.instruction: Formal, professional news anchor style, clear articulation and moderate pacing.

sohee-gentle.instruction: Gentle, soothing, calm and peaceful speaking style.

uncle_fu-old.instruction: Wise, old man voice, slightly gravelly, speaking slowly with authority.

marta-standard.instruction: Natural, conversational tone, standard pace and friendly inflection.
